Localization.Description: An attempt to bypass EDR using the Dirty Vanity utility is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} launched malicious process {subject.process.name} that created a remote thread in the address space of process {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host}. This can be a sign that malware has been injected into a legitimate process to bypass EDR.
